name: google-play-feature-graphic
notes: Required for publishing a store listing; JPEG or 24-bit PNG with no alpha.

name: google-play-screenshot-minimum
notes: Minimum dimension is 320px; JPEG or 24-bit PNG with no alpha; max dimension cannot exceed twice the min dimension.

name: google-play-screenshot-maximum
notes: Maximum dimension is 3840px; max dimension cannot be more than twice the min dimension.

name: google-play-phone-app-portrait
notes: Apps should provide at least four screenshots with minimum 1080px resolution; portrait should be 9:16.

name: google-play-phone-app-landscape
notes: Apps should provide at least four screenshots with minimum 1080px resolution; landscape should be 16:9.

name: google-play-phone-game-portrait
notes: Games should provide at least three portrait screenshots at minimum 1080x1920 and depict real in-game experience.

name: google-play-phone-game-landscape
notes: Games should provide at least three landscape screenshots at minimum 1920x1080 and depict real in-game experience.

name: google-play-tablet-portrait
notes: For tablets and Chromebooks add at least four screenshots; use 9:16 portrait between 1080px and 7680px.

name: google-play-tablet-landscape
notes: For tablets and Chromebooks add at least four screenshots; use 16:9 landscape between 1080px and 7680px.

name: google-play-wear-os-square
notes: Wear OS screenshots should show only the app interface, 1:1 aspect ratio, minimum 384x384, no transparent background or masking.

name: google-play-android-tv-landscape
notes: At least one Android TV screenshot is needed if distributing to Android TV; TV screenshots show only on TV devices.

name: google-play-automotive-portrait
notes: If automotive screenshots are provided, include at least two portrait screenshots at 800x1280 for relevant categories.

name: google-play-automotive-landscape
notes: If automotive screenshots are provided, include at least two landscape screenshots at 1024x768 for relevant categories.

name: google-play-android-xr-landscape
notes: Android XR supports 4 to 8 PNG/JPEG screenshots up to 8 MB each, 8:5 aspect ratio; recommended 3840x2400, minimum 1920x1200.
